DISCOVERY 301, PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS SET NO. ONE BE DEEMED ADMITTED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN AND NO OPPOSITION FILED. ALL REQUESTS IN THE PEOPLE'S SET ONE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. calendar.matters:
Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Victoria Robinson And Maite Kvarna In Support Thereof; Exhibits; [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS SET NO. ONE BE DEEMED ADMITTED

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for order deeming set one requests for admissions admitted. Granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed. All requests in the People's set one requests for admission are deemed admitted. Proposed order submitted. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
